descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke 4-1 in Centennial Cup round robin; face Humboldt Broncos Wednesday.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-1 on Monday in Centennial Cup round-robin play at the Humboldt Uniplex, improving to 2-0 in the tournament. Dave Tomlinson scored two third-period goals to secure the victory. Richmond will face Humboldt Broncos on Wednesday in the final round-robin game, with the winner advancing directly to Saturday's championship game. Coach Orland Kurtenbach's team killed multiple penalties during the contest.

attribution.headline: Richmond and Humboldt set for showdown
